features.description: isolation:'worktree' subagents can no longer run git-mutating commands against the main repo checkout.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `isolation: 'worktree'` subagents being able to run git-mutating commands against the main repo checkout instead of their own isolated worktree

features.description: ultracode keyword opt-in no longer fires on non-human input like webhooks or relayed PR comments.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed the `ultracode` keyword opt-in firing on non-human-originated input such as webhook payloads and relayed PR comments

features.description: Hook callback timeouts are no longer misreported as user rejections that stalled unattended sessions.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed a hook callback timeout being misreported to the model as a user rejection, which made unattended sessions stop and wait

features.description: Plugin-provided MCP servers are no longer torn down when MCP servers are re-synced mid-session.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed plugin-provided MCP servers being torn down when MCP servers are re-synced mid-session

features.description: Plan approvals without edits are no longer labeled '(edited by user)' or overwritten with a stale snapshot.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed plan approvals without edits being labeled "(edited by user)" and overwriting the plan file with a stale snapshot

features.description: Unmatched $1/$2 positional placeholders in skills and commands are now preserved verbatim instead of silently stripped.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed unmatched `$1`/`$2` positional placeholders in skills and commands being silently stripped; they are now preserved verbatim

features.description: claude agents --effort ultracode value now reaches dispatched sessions instead of being silently dropped.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `claude agents --effort ultracode` not reaching dispatched sessions; the value was silently dropped

features.description: SDK MCP servers registered via an initialize control request now start connecting immediately instead of next turn.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed SDK MCP servers registered via an `initialize` control request waiting until the next turn to start connecting

features.description: Late-appearing .claude/* symlinks are now reconciled into the sandbox deny-write list.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed late-appearing `.claude/*` symlinks not being reconciled into the sandbox deny-write list

features.description: Agent tool hardened against indirect prompt injection via content a subagent read.
features.reference_changelog_line: Hardened the Agent tool against indirect prompt injection via content a subagent read

features.description: Periodic sweep now releases git worktree locks whose owning process is gone after killed background sessions.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed killed background sessions leaving a permanent `git worktree lock` behind; the periodic sweep now releases locks whose owning process is gone

features.description: Memory writes leaving MEMORY.md index over its read limit now produce an explicit error instead of silent truncation.
features.reference_changelog_line: Memory writes that leave a MEMORY.md index over its read limit now produce an explicit error instead of silent truncation

features.description: Auto mode permission classifier defaults to Sonnet 5 for external sessions, validated on first request and pinned.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved auto mode: the permission classifier now defaults to Sonnet 5 for external sessions, validated on the session's first request and pinned for the session

features.description: /doctor now proposes auto-mode default on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry where auto mode no longer needs opt-in.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `/doctor` skipping its auto-mode-default proposal on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry, where auto mode no longer needs an opt-in

features.description: Startup warns on Write(path)/NotebookEdit(path)/Glob(path) permission rules — use Edit(path) or Read(path).
features.reference_changelog_line: Added a startup warning for `Write(path)`, `NotebookEdit(path)`, and `Glob(path)` permission rules — use `Edit(path)` or `Read(path)` instead

features.description: Bash/PowerShell tool message distinguishes timeout auto-background from explicit background requests.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved the Bash/PowerShell tool message when a command hits its timeout and is auto-backgrounded, so the model can distinguish a hang from an explicit background request

features.description: Bash tool result now states working directory is unchanged when a cd command was moved to the background.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed Claude assuming a `cd` took effect after its command was moved to the background; the tool result now states the working directory is unchanged
